query:
-- Buscar el cliente Gustavo Rodriguez
SELECT id, name, email, dataOrigin, deletedAt FROM clients WHERE name LIKE '%Gustavo%' OR name LIKE '%Rodriguez%' OR name LIKE '%Subway%';

-- Buscar sus cotizaciones (incluyendo eliminadas)
SELECT q.id, q.quotationNumber, q.status, q.totalAmount, q.deletedAt, c.name as cliente
FROM quotations q
JOIN clients c ON c.id = q.clientId
WHERE c.name LIKE '%Gustavo%' OR c.name LIKE '%Rodriguez%' OR c.name LIKE '%Subway%';

-- Buscar sus proyectos (incluyendo eliminados)
SELECT p.id, p.name, p.status, p.totalAmount, p.deletedAt, c.name as cliente
FROM projects p
JOIN clients c ON c.id = p.clientId
WHERE c.name LIKE '%Gustavo%' OR c.name LIKE '%Rodriguez%' OR c.name LIKE '%Subway%';
